news.title: News
news.subtitle: Dive into the murky but thrilling waters of Crooak. Discover the latest tactical updates, upcoming expansions, and join the community at our official tournaments.
news.latest_sub: Stay tuned for the secrets of the swamp.
news.featured_text: The horizon darkens on the game board. This new expansion introduces 'Fog of War' tiles and forbidden relics that will shake up your most established strategies. Prepare your frogs for a darker adventure.
news.art1_text: Master advanced movements to surprise your opponents before the final tile is placed.
news.art2_title: Community: Fans create their own tiles
news.art2_text: Discover the best creations from this month's 'Marshland Designer' contest.

home.hero_title:
The path
is created by
moving forward.
home.hero_desc: Lead an expedition of heroic frogs. Build the swamp, set traps, and be the first to conquer the Lost Treasure and the Princess's heart. Every tile placed changes your destiny.
home.pil1_desc: Anticipate, plan, control the terrain. Victory smiles on the frog who sees beyond the next lily pad.
home.pil2_desc: Short, fast-paced games full of twists. Laughter and betrayals guaranteed around the table.
home.pil3_desc: The game board doesn't exist. You build it tile by tile. No two games are alike.
home.pil4_desc: Each expedition starts with the same basic equipment. Only your choices will make the difference.
home.pil5_desc: Rules that can be explained in 5 minutes. Simple to learn, but deliciously complex to master.
home.act1_desc: Each player receives a starting deck including a unique key card. It's your secret and your main strategic objective.
home.act2_desc: Place one terrain card per turn to form interconnected paths that assemble dangerously towards the central chest.
home.act3_desc: Use sticky relics to modify the environment, boost your own path, or cheerfully sabotage your opponents'.
home.act4_desc: The first amphibian to continuously link their key to the chest wins the game. Be cunning, be fast. Ribbit!
home.sec4_desc: Crooak is not just a simple evening pastime. It's a modular playground designed to become a benchmark in the world of tile-placement games. An experience that intimately blends construction and direct interaction, designed to last forever in your game libraries.
home.vis1_desc: Upcoming expansions and frog guides. The swamp is expanding.
home.vis2_desc: A system where the topography evolves with each placement. A living battlefield.
home.vis3_desc: An intergenerational design. Fluid rules for all players.
home.sec5_title:
Ready to place the
first tile?
home.sec5_desc: Join the Crooak community now. Pre-order your founders edition and earn exclusive "item" cards.

rules.title:
The swamp can be learned in
a few tiles.
rules.desc:
This game of tiles and deceit is made to be played right away.
Let the interactive guide you, or dive into the manual.
What matters? Understand, dodge and win.
rules.quest_title: A quest in the heart of the swamp.
rules.quest_p1: In a declining ecosystem, frog kingdoms clash to seize the last fragments of livable territory: the Crown. Lead your own troop of amphibians into this hostile swamp.
rules.quest_p2: Their survival is not played out in combat, but through cunning: build a viable domain, isolate your opponents and block their progress on a modular board that expands each turn.
rules.quest_p3: Keep moving, adapt to other players' tiles, each game is a different race for speed.
rules.obj_desc: Trap opposing frogs while saving your court. The Crown awaits only one winner!
rules.elem_desc: Everything you need to design, expand and destroy the landscape.
rules.elem1_desc: 4 sets containing the battalions of each clan to lead your troops.
rules.elem2_desc: Base board and expansions. Laying a path means blocking the others.
rules.elem3_desc: The ultimate goal. It will only be acquired once your opponents are lost.
rules.elem4_desc: For the surviving clan. The fate of the others fades into the swamps.
rules.set1_desc: Each player takes the frogs of their color. The pawns are highlighted. All players have the same chances at the start.
rules.set2_desc: There are two piles. A starting pile. And a draw pile.
rules.set3_desc: The crown tile is placed in the center, within reach of all armies. The placement must be done randomly. It remains inaccessible on the first turn.
rules.set4_desc: Each player draws 4 Action cards. These cards remain secret.
rules.set5_desc: Players place their frogs at one end of the swamp. The battle begins.
rules.act_desc: Each turn, a player has the right to choose between one of these four actions. Planning for survival starts here.
rules.act1_desc: Take a tile from the draw pile and connect it with another in the swamp, from whichever side you want. This action will help create a path to victory. But beware of trapped tiles.
rules.act2_desc: Play one of the secret cards from your hand. Actions vary: cancel an action, forbid moving for a turn, move an opponent, steal a card, etc.
rules.act3_desc: Move the King to an adjacent space, if he is not blocked. A blocked pawn will remain on its tile.
rules.act4_desc: If you are blocked, and no action is possible, discard one of your action cards to draw a new one.
rules.wheel_l1: Multiple possible paths, the player freely chooses their direction.
rules.wheel_l2: Only one possible path, the player is forced to follow it.
rules.wheel_l3: No possible path, the player stays on their square (e.g. the wheel indicates 3, only 1 square is passable, the player does not move).
rules.wheel_l4: It is forbidden to turn back during the same turn.
rules.tile_desc: Elements to anticipate, block your opponents, or force them to change strategy.
rules.t1_desc: Blocks a path. It is impossible to cross this tile, no matter what card is played.
rules.t2_desc: Traps a tile. Pawns passing over it sink, and their turn is canceled, blocking a path.
rules.t3_desc: Teleports a pawn that passes on this tile, to take it to another Portal randomly drawn from the pile.
rules.t4_desc: The player moves one extra tile if they wish, during their turn, for free.
rules.card_title: Eight cards to shake up the game.
rules.card_desc: To keep in hand or play at the right time. Choice allies or machiavellian traps.
rules.c1_desc: Cancels the last action performed by an opponent (except movement). The card is then discarded.
rules.c2_desc: The player can cross a "Hole" tile safely (can only be used once per pawn).
rules.c3_desc: Blocks an opposing pawn for 1 turn. The targeted pawn can no longer move or be moved by others.
rules.c4_desc: The player targets an opponent's hand, and steals a random card from them. The opponent draws a card to compensate.
rules.c5_desc: The player removes a tile from the board and returns it to the draw pile. All pawns on this tile are placed back on their initial starting point.
rules.c6_desc: If an opponent attempts an attack card against you ("Trip", "Steal"), the effect is returned against themselves.
rules.c7_desc: Gain 1 extra action during this turn (so you can move twice in a row, for example).
rules.c8_desc: Choose one of your pawns. It becomes completely invisible to other players for 1 turn, and cannot be targeted.
